title: AlexBank (Egypt) Profile & Reviews
description: Explore a detailed profile and institutional data for AlexBank in Egypt. Share your experience or access institutional-grade data for professional insights.

faq.question: What is AlexBank?
faq.answer: AlexBank, officially known as Bank of Alexandria, is one of the largest private sector commercial banks in Egypt. The bank provides retail, corporate, and investment banking services throughout the Arab Republic of Egypt. AlexBank is a key subsidiary of Intesa Sanpaolo Group, one of Europe's largest banking groups, which has held majority ownership since the bank's privatization in 2006. As of 2024, AlexBank operates through its head office in Cairo and more than 180 branches nationwide, employing approximately 4,300 staff members.

faq.question: When was AlexBank founded?
faq.answer: AlexBank was established on April 17, 1957, as a state-owned commercial banking institution. The bank began operations with 43 branches and units, gradually expanding to become one of Egypt's premier banking institutions. In 1972, the bank was designated to specialize in funding Egypt's industrial sector. The bank underwent significant transformation in October 2006 when it was privatized. Intesa Sanpaolo Group acquired majority ownership, marking AlexBank's transition from a state-owned institution to a leading private sector bank in Egypt.

faq.question: Where is AlexBank headquartered?
faq.answer: AlexBank is headquartered at 49 Kasr El Nil Street in downtown Cairo, Egypt. This location serves as the central administrative, strategic planning, and operational command center for all of the bank's activities nationwide. The headquarters building is located in Cairo's bustling financial district.

faq.question: Where does AlexBank operate?
faq.answer: AlexBank operates exclusively within Egypt, maintaining a comprehensive nationwide presence. The bank has strategically located branches across all Egyptian governorates, including major cities such as Cairo, Alexandria, Giza, Mansura, Sohag, Bani Suef, and numerous other urban and regional centers. With over 170 branch locations spanning from northern Alexandria to southern Sohag, AlexBank ensures widespread financial service coverage throughout Egypt. The bank has developed particularly strong presence in key industrial zones and commercial areas.

faq.question: What services does AlexBank offer?
faq.answer: AlexBank provides a comprehensive range of financial products and services: Retail Banking: Current accounts, savings deposits, time deposits, personal loans, mortgages, auto financing, and foreign currency accounts. Cards: Credit cards, debit cards, and prepaid cards with domestic and international acceptance. Corporate Banking: Business loans, trade finance, cash management, treasury services, and financing for multinational clients, domestic large corporations, and medium enterprises. Investment Banking: Securities services, agency services, custodian services, fund supervisory services, and financial derivatives. Digital Banking: Online banking platform, mobile banking application, SMS banking, and internet-based financial services for convenient 24/7 account access. International Services: Letters of credit, import and export financing, documentary collections, and SWIFT-based international transfers.

faq.question: What makes AlexBank unique?
faq.answer: AlexBank distinguishes itself through its combination of deep Egyptian market knowledge and European banking expertise from its parent company, Intesa Sanpaolo Group. This dual heritage provides customers with access to both local market understanding and international best practices. The bank has demonstrated strong financial performance, announcing a 21% year-on-year increase in net profit to EGP 4 billion in 2023. AlexBank has formed strategic partnerships with leading fintech platforms, including a collaboration with valU, MENA's leading Buy-Now, Pay-Later platform, to provide innovative financing options for educational expenses. The bank emphasizes commitment to digital innovation, customer focus, and ethical banking practices. As part of the Intesa Sanpaolo network, AlexBank benefits from global expertise and extensive correspondent banking relationships.

faq.question: What type of financial institution is AlexBank?
faq.answer: AlexBank is a commercial bank operating as an Egyptian joint stock company. The institution operates under the provisions of the Central Bank of Egypt and Banking Sector regulations, specifically governed by Monetary Law No. 88/2003 and Law No. 194/2020. The bank provides universal banking services encompassing retail, corporate, and investment banking activities. AlexBank's shares are publicly traded on the Egyptian Exchange (EGX) under the ticker symbol ALEX. The bank prepares its financial statements in accordance with Egyptian Accounting Standards (EAS) and IFRS 9 requirements as mandated by the Central Bank of Egypt.
